title: The Java Module System with Sander Mak
summary: At J-Fall 2018 I talked to Sander Mak, modularity expert at Luminis, about the Java module system (J_MS), its adoption, how it compares to OSGi, and more.
content:
At J-Fall 2018 I talked to Sander Mak, modularity expert at Luminis, about the Java module system (J_MS), its adoption, how it compares to OSGi, and more.

Some links to follow up:

  • J-Fall 2018
  • Sander's talk (in Dutch)
  • Sander on Twitter
  • Sander Mak's book Java 9 Modularity
  • my book The Java Module System

Watch the video.
